chatWithMessages.userMessage: nikeze uhlu lwezithuthi ezinkulu kunazo zonke ezake zakhiwa ezihambayo
chatWithMessages.assistantMessage:
Nalu uhlu **lwezithuthi ezinkulu kunazo zonke ezake zakhiwa ezihambayo** (kugxilwe emishini emikhulu ehambayo/ezihamba ngokwayo yasemhlabeni, ihlelwe ngokuhlangana kobukhulu bomzimba, ubude, isisindo nokuhlonishwa):

- **Overburden Conveyor Bridge F60**  
  Enkulu kunazo zonke ngobukhulu bomzimba / ubude. Ubude: ~502 m, Ukuphakama: ~80 m, Isisindo: ~13,600 amathani. Yakhiwe eMpumalanga Jalimane (1988–1991) ukususa umhlabathi ongaphezulu emayini e-lignite; ihamba kancane kakhulu emareylini.

- **Bagger 293** (umshini womba onezindishi ezijikelezayo)  
  Isithuthi esisindayo kunazo zonke emhlabeni esake sakhiwa (~14,200–14,196 amathani). Ukuphakama: ~96 m, Ubude: ~225 m. Yakhiwe ngo-1995 yi-TAKRAF; inerekhodi le-Guinness njengomshini womba omkhulu/osindayo kunawo wonke emhlabeni; isusa kufinyelela ku-~240,000 amathani ezinto ngosuku.

- **Bagger 288** (umshini womba onezindishi ezijikelezayo)  
  Ngaphambilini yayinerekhodi lesithuthi esisindayo kunazo zonke emhlabeni. Ukuphakama: ~96 m, Ubude: ~220 m, Isisindo: ~13,500 amathani. Yakhiwe ngo-1978 yi-Krupp/TAKRAF; idume ngokuthuthwa kwayo kwama-km angama-22 kwelula imigwaqo, imifula namabhulohwe.

- **NASA Crawler-Transporter** (CT-1 ne-CT-2)  
  Isithuthi esisindayo kunazo zonke esizihambela emhlabeni (irekhodi le-Guinness ngemva kokuthuthukiswa). Isisindo: ~2,721–3,016 amathani, Ubukhulu: 40 m × 35 m. Yakhiwe ngo-1965; ithwala amarokhethi/izithuthi zasemkhathini e-Kennedy Space Center (isivinini esikhulu ~1–2 mph).

- **BelAZ-75710** (iloli lasemayini)  
  Iloli elikhulu kunawo wonke ngomthwalo (~450 amathani). Isisindo singenalutho: ~360 amathani, Ubude: ~20.6 m. Iloli lesimanje le-ultra-class; enye yezithuthi ezinkulu kunazo zonke ezinamasondo ezihambayo.

- **LeTourneau L-2350** (umlayishi wamasondo)  
  Umshini omkhulu kunawo wonke wokumba/ukulayisha ngokwamarekhodi e-Guinness. Umthamo omkhulu wendishi; usayizi wamathayi ~4 m. Isetshenziswa emayini esindayo; omunye wabelayishi abakhulu kunawo wonke bamasondo.

Eminye imishini emikhulu ehambayo ebalulekile:
- Big Muskie (ishavela yokuhlikihla yomlando, ~13,500 amathani, yadilizwa)
- Marion 6360 ("The Captain", ishavela yokuhlikihla enkulu, ~12,700 amathani, yaqedwa)
- Imishini ehlukahlukene emikhulu yokumba imigede (isib. amamodeli e-Herrenknecht afinyelela ku-~17–20 m usayizi wesikali, nakuba ngokuvamile ingezihambeli ngokuphelele ngendlela efanayo)

Qaphela: "Biggest" kuncike esilinganisweni—ubude (F60), isisindo (Bagger 293), ukuzihambela (NASA Crawler), noma umthwalo (BelAZ). Lezi ngokuyinhloko yizithuthi zasemhlabeni zezimboni/zasemayini/zokuthutha hhayi imikhumbi, izindiza noma izitimela.

chatWithCodeExample.userMessage: ngikhombise one-liners ezinhle ze-kotlin, swift, c, python, js
chatWithCodeExample.codeIntro: Nazi ezinye one-liners ezimfushane nezinhle ngolimi ngalunye (isishicilelo sika-2025 😄):

items.title: Mars
items.description: Umhlaba Obomvu, owesine ukusuka eLangeni futhi uyinto ebalulekile ekuhlolweni kwabantu.

items.title: Black Holes
items.description: Izindawo zesikhathi-nendawo lapho amandla adonsayo enamandla kakhulu ukuthi akukho okungaphunyuka.

items.title: Apollo 11
items.description: Umsebenzi wokuqala onabantu owahlala eNyangeni ngo-1969, uthwele izigibeli zasemkhathini ezintathu.

items.title: Saturn's Rings
items.description: Amasongo amangalisayo eqhwa namatshe azungeze inkanyezi enkulu yegesi Saturn.

items.title: Voyager Program
items.description: Izithuthi ezimbili zasemkhathini ezafana ezathunyelwa ngo-1977, manje zisemkhathini ophakathi kwezinkanyezi.

items.title: Milky Way
items.description: Igalaksi yakithi equkethe izinkanyezi ezingaphezu kwezigidigidi eziyikhulu namaplanethi angenakubalwa.

items.title: Solar Eclipses
items.description: Lapho iNyanga idlula phakathi kweLanga noMhlaba, iphonsa isithunzi.

items.title: Neutron Stars
items.description: Izinsalela ezisindayo kakhulu zezinkanyezi ezinkulu ezishuthekwe esigqini esincane.
